title: AGP Gossip Record
description: An immutable, origin-signed unit of gossip evidence. A record is never authoritative: it is one attributed, expiring observation. See spec/core.md section 3.

recordId.description: Content address: SHA-256 hash of the JSON Canonicalization Scheme (RFC 8785) form of this record without 'signature'.

issuer.description: Identifier of the agent that observed and signed this record. May differ from 'subject'; see spec/core.md section 3.2.

issuerEpoch.description: Opaque token that changes whenever the issuer's sequence counter resets (e.g. on restart), disambiguating 'sequence' across issuer lifetimes.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing counter scoped to (issuer, issuerEpoch). Used for replay/out-of-order rejection; see spec/security.md section 7.

kind.description: Versioned record type governing the shape of 'value'. v1 defines exactly these four kinds; see spec/core.md section 4.

value.description: Kind-specific evidence payload; see the 'allOf' constraints below.

observedAt.description: When the issuer made the observation (RFC 3339).

expiresAt.description: When this record MUST be treated as stale and discarded.

supersedes.description: recordId of a prior record this one corrects or retracts. Records are never mutated in place; see spec/core.md section 3.4.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The action path, capability, or agent this record is about.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Tenant/domain/partition context used for authorization and reconciliation; see spec/security.md section 3.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.description: How the observation was made. MUST NOT be replaced by a bare confidence score; see spec/core.md section 3.3.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Issuer signature over the canonical (JCS) unsigned record. Authenticates this record only; it is unrelated to A2A Agent Card signing.

normalizedErrorClass.title: Normalized Error Class
normalizedErrorClass.description: A closed set of error classes. Raw exception strings or stack traces MUST NOT appear here; see spec/security.md section 9.

agentLifecycleValue.title: agent.lifecycle.v1 value
agentLifecycleValue.description: Self-reported runtime state. issuer MUST equal subject for this kind.

routeSliValue.title: route.sli.v1 value
routeSliValue.description: Direct measurements made while issuer invoked the subject capability.

errorClasses.description: Map of normalizedErrorClass to occurrence count.

capabilityEvaluationValue.title: capability.evaluation.v1 value
capabilityEvaluationValue.description: An evaluation result issued by an authorized evaluator. Scores across different suites/versions/dataset classes are not comparable; see spec/core.md section 4.3.

evaluator.description: Identifier of the authorized evaluator agent.

peerReferralValue.title: peer.referral.v1 value
peerReferralValue.description: A hint that another A2A endpoint or capability may exist. MUST NOT be trusted until the receiver fetches and validates the referenced Agent Card; see spec/core.md section 4.4 and spec/discovery.md section 3.

targetUri.description: URI of the referenced agent or Agent Card.

reason.description: Closed set of referral reasons. MUST NOT be used to carry a free-form reputation assertion (e.g. 'Agent X is good'); see spec/core.md section 3.6.
